---
title: "Tarea Programada 2 - Análisis de Vuelos NYC 2013"
author: "Jorge Liang"
date: "2026-06-04"
output: html_document
---

Cargar bibliotecas
```{r}
library(nycflights13)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)
library(lubridate)
library(DT)
```

```{r}
data("flights")
data("airlines")
data("airports")
data("planes")
data("weather")
```

```{r}
print('hello word')
```
